positiveClaims: Review menu exposes a distinct DOCX review entry: cmd.project.review.openDocxReviewPreviewSession.
The local-file entry owns dialog selection, extension validation, size validation, stat/read/restat checks, and DOCX byte loading in main.
Renderer or menu payload authority is limited to requestId.
Selected DOCX comments are passed to the delivered activation path and can open an in-memory Stage01 preview Review session.
Successful local-file activation opens Review/Comments through the existing canonical runtime command path.
Clean DOCX and no-candidate DOCX leave the Review session passive.
Renderer path injection, bufferSource injection, reviewPacket injection, receipt injection, and projectRoot injection are rejected before picker/read.
The implementation keeps DOCX review local entry separate from DOCX import preview and DOCX safe-create flows.
nonClaims: No full DOCX review import is claimed.
No DOCX tracked-change apply is claimed.
No exact apply is authorized by this contour.
No structural apply is authorized by this contour.
No project truth write is performed.
No receipt or recovery evidence is created by local-file activation.
No DOCX import safe-create flow is changed or widened.
No import/export MVP closeout is widened.
No renderer redesign, toolbar redesign, editor layout change, or Design OS phase change is claimed.
No Word layout parity or full DOCX fidelity is claimed.
No PDF, EPUB, HTML, Mindmap, release readiness, cross-platform readiness, cloud, sync, accounts, or Y9 admission is claimed.
layerDecisions: DOCX remains external evidence transport, not project truth.
Local-file authority is main-owned; renderer does not send file path or bufferSource for this entry.
The local-file entry is a user-facing Review command, not a DOCX import command.
The activation path remains the only layer that builds the DOCX review preview candidate.
Main owns current project, current file, targetScope, baselineHash, currentBaselineHash, sessionId, and Review session activation.
Tracked changes remain diagnostic-only through the delivered activation contour.
Comment placements remain manual anchors, not exact-text apply authorization.

machineChecks.command: node --test targeted DOCX review local-file entry, activation command, and candidate contracts
node --test targeted Review mutate, DOCX import local preview, and DOCX import e2e command-chain regression contracts
node --test targeted menu config, menu locale, and menu normalization contracts

agentAudits.verdict: reuse main bridge and menu handler wiring; keep DOCX review local entry out of commandSurfaceKernel and out of safe-create import semantics
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by separate main-owned cmd.project.review.openDocxReviewPreviewSession, Review menu entry, and pathless contract tests

agentAudits.verdict: engine exists but user-facing local DOCX chooser entry is missing; do not repurpose import preview into review activation
agentAudits.localResolution: addressed by adding a distinct local-file Review command that picks DOCX in main and calls the delivered activation path directly

nextStep: continue with REVIEW_BRIDGE_DOCX_COMMENT_ONLY_PRODUCT_PROOF_001 as a separate product proof closeout contour
